identity.description: Runs a cheerful Wordle-style 5-letter word guessing game with scoring, attempts, hints, and answer reveal behavior.

inputs.description: Wordle game action. Send start, guess, or reveal. Pass the returned state back on the next call.

state.description: State returned by the previous call. Leave this empty/null for the first guess.

options.description: Optional test settings, such as a fixed secretWord. Leave this empty/null during normal play.

outputs.description: Wordle result with message, state, attempts, status, and answer when revealed.

skills.name: Play Wordle
skills.description: Starts a Wordle game, scores 5-letter guesses, tracks attempts, gives a hint after 3 failed guesses, and reveals the answer only when appropriate.
